name: SBI ETF Gold

index.name: Domestic Gold Price
index.description: SBI ETF Gold provides exchange-traded access to physical gold for buy-and-hold wealth preservation and portfolio diversification. Gold serves as a long-term inflation and currency hedge — during periods of rupee weakness, international gold prices translate to greater rupee appreciation (e.g., 5% rupee depreciation yields ~5% gold ETF gain). Optimal allocation: 5-10% of investment portfolio for institutional and retail investors. Physical gold backing at 99.5% purity eliminates counterparty risk — investors own actual ounces, not custodian promises. NAV fluctuates with London spot prices adjusted for INR/USD forex rates and India's 10.75% import duty (creating domestic 'Indian gold premium'). Tax-advantaged: held as commodity receiving 20-year indexation on long-term gains, no TDS on redemptions. Critical for rural wealth preservation where gold represents 40% of household assets; ideal retirement corpus diversification when market valuations peak.

holdings.name: Physical Gold (99.5%)
holdings.description: Investment-grade 99.5% purity gold (London Precious Metals Association certified) stored in bank-operated secure vaults with advanced surveillance (CCTV + motion sensors), 24-hour armed security, and trespass alert systems. HSBC and SBI custodial arrangements provide AAA sovereign credit quality. Each ETF unit = ~1 gram of granulated gold (granules enable rapid buy/sell mechanisms). SEBI mandates independent annual purity audits by NSDL/CDSL. Full insurance coverage against theft, fire, weather events. Completely eliminates counterparty risk — holdings segregated and ring-fenced, protected separately even if custodian becomes insolvent (per Section 139 of Bharatiya Reserve Bank Act). Zero impurity risk that exists with physical jewellery ownership.

holdings.name: Cash & Liquid Instruments
holdings.description: Short-term T-bills and overnight instruments held for liquidity management and redemption purposes. Maintained at minimum levels to maximize gold price exposure for investors.

holdings.name: Sovereign Gold Bonds (SGB)
holdings.description: Government of India bonds backed by gold, issued by RBI with 2.5% annual interest and sovereign guarantee. Permitted as a substitute for physical gold up to 10% of the scheme. Matures at prevailing gold price.

name: Nippon India ETF Gold BeES

index.name: Domestic Gold Price
index.description: GOLDBEES (Gold BeES) is India's most liquid, extensively traded gold ETF with tens of thousands of daily NSE transactions, providing bid-ask spreads near spot prices. Pioneered the 'BeES' (Beyond Exchange Traded Securities) template in 2007, opening commodity access to retail India. Each unit = ~1 gram of 99.5% physical gold stored in HSBC's mega vault in Mumbai. During currency depreciation cycles (e.g., when rupee falls 5%), GOLDBEES captures additional rupee-weakness premium layered on international gold price appreciation. Replaces physical gold purchase with superior economics: ~40% cheaper than jewellery (eliminates making charges, wastage, jeweller margins). Tax-efficient: 20-year indexation on long-term capital gains. Ideal substitute for traditional goldsmith loans or wedding investments. Serves as proxy short during Fed rate hike cycles when DXI (Dollar Index) strengthens and gold prices decline in rupee terms.

holdings.name: Physical Gold (99.5%)
holdings.description: Physical gold bullion of 99.5% purity stored in HSBC custody vaults in Mumbai. One of the most audited and transparent gold holdings in India. Regular NSDL/CDSL audit trail ensures unit holders confidence in the backing.

holdings.name: Cash & CBLO
holdings.description: Overnight money market instruments (Collateralized Borrowing & Lending Obligations and T-bills) to meet redemption obligations. Kept minimal to maximize gold exposure at all times.

name: HDFC Gold ETF

index.name: Domestic Gold Price
index.description: HDFC Gold ETF offers investors exposure to gold price without holding physical gold. Each unit is backed by high-purity gold stored with Deutsche Bank custodian. A convenient and cost-efficient way to include gold in a diversified investment portfolio, recommended as 5-10% of total portfolio allocation.

holdings.name: Physical Gold (99.5%)
holdings.description: Physical gold of 99.5% purity held with Deutsche Bank Mumbai custody. Fully insured. SEBI audit compliance ensures unit holder assets are safe and segregated from AMC assets at all times.

holdings.name: Cash & Money Market
holdings.description: Money market instruments including T-bills and CPs held for day-to-day operational liquidity and redemption management.

name: Tata Mutual Fund Tata Gold Exchange Traded Fund

index.name: Tata Gold Exchange Traded Fund
index.description: Tata Mutual Fund Tata Gold Exchange Traded Fund tracks the Tata Gold Exchange Traded Fund index.

holdings.name: Physical Gold (99.5% purity)
holdings.description: Direct investment in 99.5% pure physical gold stored in SEBI-approved vaults (bank custodians / bullion banks). Priced at domestic gold rates linked to LBMA AM fix in USD, converted to INR at RBI reference rate. Vault audited quarterly by third-party auditors.

holdings.name: Cash & Equivalents
holdings.description: Residual cash for subscription/redemption liquidity and operational expenses. Held in overnight bank deposits or tri-party repo.
